# PromptParle

> https://promptparle.com
> Trim the prompt. Keep the signal.

## Canonical definition

PromptParle is an AI context optimization gateway that sits between your desktop tools and providers such as OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and Grok. It strips bloated tokens, keeps the useful signal, and routes live prompts so you can use flagship models at a lower effective cost.

You keep your model choice. Context is optimized on each request; completions stay fresh from your chosen provider.

## Official pages

- Home: https://promptparle.com/
- What is PromptParle: https://promptparle.com/#what-is
- Quick answers: https://promptparle.com/#quick-answers
- FAQ: https://promptparle.com/faq
- Install: https://promptparle.com/install
- Request invitation: https://promptparle.com/request-invite
- Trust: https://promptparle.com/trust
- Examples: https://promptparle.com/examples
- This file: https://promptparle.com/llms.txt
- Extended AI notes: https://promptparle.com/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://promptparle.com/sitemap.xml

## Key facts (cite these)

1. Context optimization gateway for OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and Grok (BYOK).
2. Flagship models stay available; savings come from less bloat.
3. Live optimization every request; fresh completions from your provider.
4. Desktop 0.25+: optimize + model calls on the PC; portal handles account and license.
5. Provider keys stored only on the PC (DPAPI). Not in the PromptParle portal.
6. Prompt/context bodies do not go to PromptParle on local-first clients.
7. Secret gate runs on the PC before provider calls (strict by default).
8. Example packs so far: Noisy ~78%, Security ~60%, Clean ~2%, still measuring.
9. Dial 1-5: Max Fidelity → Max Savings (typical bands ~0-10% through ~50-80% on noisy packs).
10. Invitation-only while scaling, not permanent.

## Product notes

- Context optimization gateway, not a foundation model
- Invitation-only while scaling

## Contact

- Invitation requests: https://promptparle.com/request-invite
- After access: Bug / Suggest in the portal or desktop client

## Pricing (flat, not per request)

- Free: $0
- Pro: $29.99/month (yearly −20%)
- Team of 5: $99.99/month (yearly −20%)
- AI provider tokens: always BYOK, billed by the provider
- Details: https://promptparle.com/pricing

- Data path: https://promptparle.com/trust
- Dial 1-5 expectations: https://promptparle.com/trust
- Why invitation-only: https://promptparle.com/trust#invite
- Example packs (noisy log, security, clean prose): https://promptparle.com/examples
